TierChanged(uint8).details: Emitted when the tier is changed

isAllowed(bytes4).details: Check if a function is allowed to be called, based on the tier. If tier of function is less than current tier, it is allowed to be called

returns._0: True if the function is allowed to be called

pause(uint8).details: Set the tier. Default = 0 : No restrictions
